ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node (e.g., master, slave) */,
  "node_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the node */,
  "node_location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location of the node */,
  "node_status" TEXT /* Current status of the node (e.g., active, maintenance, offline) */,
  "last_heartbeat" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last heartbeat received from the node */,
  "node_version" TEXT /* Version of the database software running on the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query metric */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "time_total_local_query" REAL /* Time spent on local query execution */,
  "time_check_token_valid" REAL /* Time spent on token validation */,
  "time_fetch_policy" REAL /* Time spent on policy fetching */,
  "time_get_and_check_chunk" REAL /* Time spent on chunk retrieval */,
  "time_check_access_valid" REAL /* Time spent on access validation */,
  "time_db_get_chunk" REAL /* Time spent on database chunk retrieval */,
  "time_check_tag_matches" REAL /* Time spent on tag matching */,
  "time_cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage during the query execution */,
  "time_memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during the query execution */,
  "time_network_latency" REAL /* Network latency during the query execution */,
  "time_disk_io" REAL /* Disk I/O time during the query execution */,
  "time_cache_hit" REAL /* Time spent on cache hits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, DevOps) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "node_id" TEXT /* ID of the node being accessed */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
